transcript: Speaker A: Sir लालबाग कैसे जाना है? [Sir, how to go to Lalbaug?] Speaker B: Just take the number 25c bus from here, and then it's only a short walk from there. Speaker A: Sir समझा नहीं, English अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Sir, didn't understand, I don't know English well.] Speaker B: अरे आजकल के ज़माने में English सीखना तो बहुत important है, सीख क्यों नहीं लेते? [Oh, in today's era, learning English is very important, why don't you learn?] Speaker A: Sir मेरे पास time कहाँ है? आपने कहाँ से सीखा? [Sir, where do I have time? Where did you learn from?] Speaker B: मैंने तो MySivi app से सीखा है। और ज़्यादा time की कोई ज़रूरत नहीं है, इस app पर बस 10-15 min practice करो and your English will get better in some days. [I learned from MySivi app. And there's no need for much time, just practice 10-15 mins on this app and your English will get better in some days.] Speaker A: ये MySivi app क्या है? [What is this MySivi app?] Speaker B: इस app में एक AI teacher है जिसके साथ तुम बिना किसी judgment के English practice कर सकते हो। और best part कि गलतियाँ करोगे तो AI तुरंत correct भी कर देती है। [In this app, there is an AI teacher with whom you can practice English without any judgment. And the best part is if you make mistakes, the AI corrects you immediately.] Speaker A: पर Sir ये app तो महँगा होगा ना? [But Sir, this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं! मैंने तो बस ₹1 में शुरू किया था, तुम भी कर सकते हो। [Not at all! I started for just 1 rupee, you can too.] Speaker A: कैसे start करूँ? [How do I start?] Speaker B: बस install button पे click करो, MySivi app install करो and अपनी English learning journey शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, install MySivi app and start your English learning journey.] Voiceover: Install now पे click करो और MySivi app download करो। [Click on install now and download MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Sir लालबाग कैसे [Sir, how to Lalbaug], Just Take The Number 25c Bus, And Then It's Only A Short Walk From There, Sir समझा नहीं [Sir, didn't understand], English अच्छे से नहीं आती [Don't know English well], अरे आज कल के ज़माने में English सीखना तो बहुत Important है सीख क्यों नहीं लेते [Oh, in today's era learning English is very important why don't you learn it], Sir मेरे पास time कहाँ है आपने कहाँ से सीखा [Sir, where is the time where did you learn from], मैंने तो Mysivi App से सीखा है [I learned from MySivi app], और ज्यादा Time नहीं है इस App पर बस 10-15 Min Practice करो And Your English Will Get Better In Somedays [and more time is not needed on this app just 10-15 min practice and your English will get better in some days], MySivi App क्या है [What is MySivi App], इस App में एक Ai Teacher है जिसके साथ तुम बिना किसी Judgment के English Practice कर सकते हो [In this app an AI teacher is there with whom you can practice English without any judgment], और Best Part कि गलतियां करोगे तो Ai तुरंत Correct भी कर देती है [and best part that if you make mistakes then AI immediately corrects also], पर Sir ये App तो महंगा होगा ना [But Sir this app must be expensive right], बिल्कुल नहीं मैंने तो बस 1 रुपये में शुरू किया था तुम भी कर सकते हो [Not at all I just started for 1 rupee you can also do], कैसे Start करूँ [How do I start], बस Install Button पे Click करो MySivi App Install करो And अपनी English Learning Journey शुरू करो [Just click on install button install MySivi app and start your English learning journey], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A young man asks a traffic cop for directions in Hindi, but the cop replies in English. When the man admits he struggles with English and lacks time, the cop recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its AI teacher, 10-15 minute daily practice, and low starting price of 1 rupee.
